# MuleSoft Azure Key Vault Properties Provider

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of Azure Key Vault Properties Provider documentation.
> See [Azure Key Vault Properties Provider llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Azure Key Vault Properties Provider documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Azure Key Vault Properties Provider 2.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector/latest/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-reference.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Azure Key Vault Properties Provider to Version 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector/latest/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-upgrade-guide.md)
- [Azure Key Vault Properties Provider 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector/latest/index.md)
